releaseNotes: 4.9.4: UI overhaul Phase A-C — style token foundation (semantic colors, typography/spacing/corner scales, CJK font); structured block data flow (MarkdownBlockParser); Markdown rendering via CommunityToolkit + TextMate syntax highlighting (VS Code grammars bundled); streaming markdown (stable-prefix memoization); code block with line numbers/fold/copy. Fixes: dark-mode markdown invisible, cursor blinking after response, thinking block disappearing.
